2604.25306.title: QFlash: Bridging Quantization and Memory Efficiency in Vision Transformer Attention
2604.25306.paper_summary: FlashAttention improves efficiency through tiling, but its online softmax still relies on floating-point arithmetic for numerical stability, making full quantization difficult. We identify three main obstacles to integer-only FlashAttention: (1) scale explosion during tile-wise accumulation, (2) inefficient shift-based exponential operations on GPUs, and (3) quantization granularity constraints requiring uniform scales for integer comparison. To address these challenges, we propose \textit{QFlash}, an end-to-end integer FlashAttention design that performs softmax entirely in the integer domain and runs as a single Triton kernel. On seven attention workloads from ViT, DeiT, and Swin models, QFlash achieves up to 6.73$\times$ speedup over I-ViT and up to 8.69$\times$ speedup on Swin, while reducing energy consumption by 18.8\% compared to FP16 FlashAttention, without sacrificing Top-1 accuracy on ViT/DeiT and remaining competitive on Swin under per-tensor quantization. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/EfficientCompLab/qflash.
2604.25306.paper_summary_zh: FlashAttention 透過切塊提高效率，但其在線 softmax 仍依賴浮點運算以確保數值穩定性，這使得完全量化變得困難。我們確定了僅使用整數的 FlashAttention 的三個主要障礙：（1）在切塊累積過程中的尺度爆炸，（2）在 GPU 上基於位移的指數運算效率低下，以及（3）量化粒度限制要求整數比較的均勻尺度。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 \textit{QFlash}，這是一種端到端的整數 FlashAttention 設計，完全在整數域中執行 softmax，並作為單個 Triton 核心運行。在來自 ViT、DeiT 和 Swin 模型的七個注意力工作負載中，QFlash 在 I-ViT 上實現了高達 6.73$\times$ 的加速，在 Swin 上實現了高達 8.69$\times$ 的加速，同時與 FP16 FlashAttention 相比，降低了 18.8\% 的能耗，且在 ViT/DeiT 上不犧牲 Top-1 準確率，並在每個張量量化下仍然在 Swin 上保持競爭力。我們的代碼已公開可用於 https://github.com/EfficientCompLab/qflash。
2604.25306.author: Sehyeon Oh et.al.
2604.25306.authors: Sehyeon Oh, Yongin Kwon, Jemin Lee
